nasb.text: The city shall be 18,000 cubits round about; and the name of the city from that day shall be, ‘The Lord is there.’ ”

esv.text: The circumference of the city shall be 18,000 cubits. And the name of the city from that time on shall be, The Lord Is There.”

cnv.text: 城的周圍共長九千公尺。從此以後，這城的名字要稱為‘耶和華的所在’。”

ccb.text: 城的四周共长十公里，从那时起，这城必叫‘耶和华的居所’。”
